general_provisions: This bill amends provisions relating to automotive repairs.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines "OEM aftermarket crash part";<hr><ltbullet>enacts notice requirements relating to aftermarket crash parts at the time of issuance and renewal;<hr><ltbullet>amends notice requirements relating to the written estimate when an insurer authorizes or specifies the use of a non-OEM aftermarket part;<hr><ltbullet>provides that the commissioner of the Insurance Department and the Insurance Department are not required to administer or enforce a provision this bill enacts; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical changes.
